text:
It was just another quiet summer evening. She sat outdoors on her favorite lawn chair. There were stars out. A cat came over.

She waved.

"What?"

No thing. Just you and me.

She smiled.

That's good…

She got a catnip ball.

They chased.

That night…

Their shadows danced.

It hadn't felt right.

It wasn't just the thing.

They decided not to talk.

They just looked.

They were just two cats.


They liked each other.

Just maybe not a thing.
